tasks.label: Mirror transfer iDeaLQuant to asmeril
tasks.command: git clone --mirror https://github.com/marvelariantomarbun-spec/iDeaLQuant.git "C:\XHive\tmp\iDeaLQuant.mirror"; git -C "C:\XHive\tmp\iDeaLQuant.mirror" remote set-url --push origin https://github.com/asmeril/iDeaLQuant.git; git -C "C:\XHive\tmp\iDeaLQuant.mirror" push --mirror

tasks.label: XHive /end workflow now
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; Set-Location "C:\XHive\X-Hive"; Write-Host "[1/4] Desktop process cleanup"; Get-Process -Name 'x-hive-desktop','XHive' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "[2/4] Backend app.main cleanup"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe' or Name='pythonw.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -and $_.CommandLine -match '-m app.main' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host "[3/4] Health check"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; Write-Host "[WARN] Backend still responds on 8765" } catch { Write-Host "[OK] Backend closed" }; Write-Host "[4/4] Git checkpoint"; $branch = (git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD).Trim(); $changes = git status --porcelain; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($changes)) { Write-Host "[OK] No changes to commit" } else { git add .; git commit -m "chore: /end session checkpoint (2026-03-05)"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { git push origin $branch } else { Write-Host "[WARN] Commit failed or nothing to commit" } }; Write-Host "[DONE] /end workflow completed"
